data.Name: Newtek Business Services Corp
data.Description: Newtek Business Services Corp (NEWT) is a leading provider of integrated business solutions specifically designed for small to medium-sized enterprises (SMBs) in the U.S. With a diverse portfolio that includes payment processing, business lending, and cutting-edge technology services, the company enhances operational efficiency and supports growth for its clients. Newtek's focus on exceptional customer service and strategic partnerships positions it as a crucial ally for SMBs navigating competitive challenges. Committed to innovation and long-lasting client relationships, Newtek aims to drive sustainable success in an evolving market landscape.
data.Address: 4800 T-REX AVENUE, BOCA RATON, FL, UNITED STATES, 33431
